theory.canonical_statement: ID 479 defines the sub cellular interface where tubulin dipoles in microtubules act as quantum receivers for the TZP field. Synchronizing these dipoles with the 17.2 kHz resonance allows the reactor to influence intracellular processing. This entrainment forms the base of the longevity and vitality protocols. Sub Cellular Locking: Entrains intracellular vibrations to the global manifold state. Longevity Protocol: Uses quantum synchronization to reduce cellular entropy and maintain vitality.
